attributes.mlflow.spanInputs:
{"text": "AFFIDAVIT
I, Robert Kumar, do hereby solemnly affirm and declare as follows:

1. I am a resident of Sydney and am competent to make this affidavit.
2. The facts stated herein are true to the best of my knowledge and belief.
3. I have not suppressed any material fact that is within my knowledge.
4. This affidavit is made for the purpose of legal proceedings.

DEPONENT: Robert Kumar
Sworn and subscribed before me on this 22/09/2024.
Notary Public / Commissioner of Oaths.
Seal and Signature of Notary."}

{"text": "AFFIDAVIT
